author: Luel
text:
Happy birthday Kyra Shimboooo!!

I still remember the day we first met during freshman year, and I can't believe you're now an adult with a bachelor's degree while I'm still a student 😭
I was so sad that I wasn't able to graduate with you and that we didn't get to take our last photo together at graduation but I believe we will be able to see each other again🥹
Even abroad, whenever I see a frog, it reminds me of you and makes me feel nostalgic. I miss you wearing your little frog ring and hat.
Thank you for all the memories during our school years, and I hope you have a wonderful birthday and an amazing time celebrating. 🎁
I wish you all the best for your future! Love yaaa🥰

author: Sree
text: Happy Birthday Kyra!! Hope ur having the most amazing day ever!! I’m so glad to have met u at UofR, and I hope ur having so much fun!! Keep staying silly!! 🥳🎉

author: Tommy
text:
Hey Kyra, 
 Though we only met recently, I consider you an awesome friend. I’m gonna miss you tons, and whatever you choose to do I know you’ll be great at it. Don’t be a stranger!

author: Emmie
text: Hi hi Kyra!! O MAH GODDDD ur 22 now..isn’t that crazy. Im so so so SOOO proud of everything you’ve accomplished and so lucky to have you as a classmate, a friend, and even a roommate. I always wondered in the back of my mind, what would’ve happened if we met in middle school instead of college, isn’t it funny how life just somehow connects us in mysterious ways. For some reason, learning that you also went to Wagner with me back then, made me feel closer to you instantly. I hope you have a lovely birthday bubba, and of course I can’t wait to see where you end up next in life.

author: Aman
text: HAPPY BIRTHDAY KYRA POOKIE!!!! you were my "speediest friend" (get it cause speed friending :) ) at rochester, and one of the most refreshing people i've ever met. yapping with you never failed to cheer me up especially after a miserable math exam. i'm gonna miss running into you in the halls and libraries. i hope the future is kind to you and everything you want it to be <3

author: Erica
text: happy birthday kirara !!! congratulations on finishing your undergrad degree >:) i will possibly bump into you one day in the city or something (watch out..) BUT I HOPE YOU REALLY ENJOY YOUR BURTDAY

author: Jay
text:
HI KYRA!! 
 I LOVE AND ALREADY MISS YOU SO MUCH!! I’ve always ended up adopting a ton of people but was never really adopted myself, and then one day you said you adopted me and I was like OMG I’VE BEEN ADOPTED!!! You have the most contagious warmth and positivity, and I know everyone is going to feel your absence deeply. Taekwondo and college truly would not have been the same without you. So so so grateful to have been in your life!! We know you’re going off to do amazing things and we can’t wait to see it. Plspls keep in touch, pookie!! ❤️💛💚💙

author: Spencer
text:
Happy birthday Kyra! :D 
 Congratulations on turning 22 and on graduating! You’re going to do great things and I’m going to miss you at school! Good luck saving earth. 🪨🌎🫡

author: Valentina
text: HAPPY BIRTHDAY KYRA!! i can’t believe you are already 22, thats lowkey crazy!! It has been such a joy to be your friend and getting to know you! I’m going to miss you so much especially because I won’t see you roc anymore. However, I hope that your birthday is amazing and that you have wonderful and amazing day!! Thank you for everything!!
